title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
hints: dp[i] = length of the longest increasing subsequence ending at index i
For each i, check all j < i: if nums[j] < nums[i], dp[i] = max(dp[i], dp[j] + 1)
The O(n²) DP is straightforward — can you do better?
An O(n log n) approach uses a 'tails' array with binary search to maintain the smallest possible tail for each subsequence length
